background: Joseph Lister (1827-1912) demonstrated that postoperative mortality dropped from 16 fatalities in 35 procedures to 6 fatalities in 40 procedures after adopting antiseptic surgical techniques.

task.query: Determine the risks of postoperative mortality in each group.

task.answer:
Hypothesis test
A. Hypotheses. $H_0: p_1=p_2$ versus $H_{\mathrm{a}}: p_1 \neq p_2$
B. Test statistic. $z_{\text {stat }}=2.91$
C. $P$-value. $P=0.0036$, providing highly significant evidence against the null hypothesis.
D. Significance level (optional). The evidence against $H_0$ is significant at $\alpha=0.01$ (reject $H_0$ ).
